summary: ۲۶ مه ۲۰۲۶ — روزی نرم و سبک: از چای و هوای خنک کنار پنجره تا ایمیل‌های جمع‌وجور، کمک بی‌سروصدای همکار، درد شانه‌ای که با کشش کمتر شد، بوی برنج داغِ ناهار، پیام «مواظب خودت باش» مامان، پیاده‌روی کوتاه میان درخت‌های خیابان، جلسه‌ای که زود تمام شد، قهوه و سکوتِ عصر، یک خبر خوب کوچکِ غیرمنتظره، ترافیک کم، شام خنکِ ماست‌وخیار، خنده‌ی خانوادگی، و آخر شب: تخت گرم و چراغ کم‌نور.
image_prompt: Vertical poster illustration (9:16), fun and surprising, bright yet cozy. A playful “day-to-night” collage shaped like a winding ribbon timeline that curls down the page. Top scene (morning): an open window with cool blue breeze drawn as swirly ribbons, a steaming glass of tea on the sill; soft morning light. Next: a minimalist desk with a laptop showing a clean inbox icon (generic, no brands), paper airplanes made of tiny envelopes flying away to symbolize emails done fast; a small sticky note with a simple doodle “tip” coming from a coworker as a whisper bubble. Midday: a shoulder stretch silhouette with a small glowing knot loosening; a lunch scene with a simple home meal—freshly steamed rice in a bowl, visible rising steam and rice aroma illustrated as warm golden lines. A phone on the table shows a generic message bubble that reads in Persian: «مواظب خودت باش» (no names, no app UI). Afternoon: a short city walk vignette—sidewalk, street trees with lively leaves, sunlight speckles; a tiny clock icon with hands jumping forward to show the meeting ended early; a cup of afternoon coffee with a quiet “pause” aura (muted background, little sound waves fading). Early evening: a small sparkling “good news” envelope popping confetti stars; a car moving smoothly on a simplified road with sparse traffic, ending with a drawn-out relieved breath cloud at the destination. Night: a light dinner table with a bowl of mast-o-khiar (yogurt with cucumber) shown as cool minty texture with cucumber cubes and dried mint; then a warm family moment—three simple figures laughing with a cozy halo; final bottom scene: a warm bed with a textured blanket, a dim bedside lamp casting an amber cone of light, and a calm night gradient. Add cute micro-details: tiny leaves, steam curls, and star motifs connecting scenes. Hand-lettered Persian title at top: «شکرگزاریِ پایان روز» and small date: «۲۶ مه ۲۰۲۶». No Telegram UI, no private metadata.
caption: شکرگزاریِ پایان روز: از چای کنار پنجره تا تختِ گرم—امروز با چند لحظه‌ی کوچک، خیلی مهربان بود.
